title: Alleman
writer: Simon Carmiggelt, Bert Haanstra, Anton Koolhaas
actors: Simon Carmiggelt, Bert Haanstra, Peter Ustinov
plot: How do the Dutch people live? Hidden cameras filmed the crowds on the beach, during carnival time, skating on the ice plains...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 4 wins & 2 nominations total
